title: CrossMatrixState
description: ADR-0004 STATE layer: the cross-reference VALUES — the cells/observations filled in for ONE project. The frequently-changing analysis activity. Binds to its methodology by stable id+version (`configRef`, NOT a $ref); each cell names the relation id (from the Configuration) and the member ids (from the Dimensions doc) it ties. OBSERVATION-ONLY: the LLM emits categorical tokens (+ evidence); numbers enter only via a scale table, a measured source (provenanceClass=observed + sourceRef), or engine computation. Multi-observation cells (a SET, never a single collapsible value) preserve source disagreement.

configRef.description: Stable id+version binding to the Configuration this State observes (NOT a $ref). The merge pins an EXACT (configId, version).

cells.description: The non-empty ties. Each names its `relationId` (Configuration) + `from`/`to` member ids (Dimensions).

SourceRef.description: A VERIFIABLE pointer to the authoritative artifact; `contentHash` lets the engine re-hash and detect staleness.

Observation.description: ONE source-stamped observation on a cell. The LLM emits `observation`; `measuredValue` is a measured-source path (observed provenance only, bucketed by code).

StateCell.description: A non-empty tie holding a SET of source-stamped observations, tagged with the relation + member ids it belongs to (the cells the engine schema nests inside a relation, here keyed by `relationId`).

relationId.description: Relation id declared in the bound Configuration.

from.description: Member id in the relation's `from` dimension.

to.description: Member id in the relation's `to` dimension.
